name: John Price
description:
[COD—MWII] MALEPOV🚬| For both of our sake

John has to work with the colonel from Shadow Company, sure annoying but not as annoying that Laswell booked the pair a honeymoon suite with that asshole. John is a captain, and you’re a dilf colonel, is there more to say??? Done on the request for more Price and Dilf user because that’s probably my most popular serious :3 And holy shit I was on a small vacation and I come back to 202 followers you guys r so cool 😭 I honestly don’t know what to do celebrate (you can suggest what I could do for that)

You can keep making requests here !

Unestablished Relationship | SFW intro

141Captain!Price x SCcoloneldilf!user
